title: SF DBI Fees Resource

indexed_extract.summary: SF DBI publishes permit, plan review, and subject-specific fee tables, including new construction permit fees based on valuation.
key_points: DBI fee resource is the canonical city page for permit/inspection fee references.
Fee tables are separated by subject and should be mirrored into fee schedule seed packs.
Supports placeholder generation tied to valuation and permit category.

notes: Canonical SF DBI fee anchor; underlying tables still need mirroring by subject.
